attacks.text: Core gene cutoff (top 200-500) is arbitrary. Different cutoffs may yield different enrichment results. Must test multiple cutoffs (100, 200, 500) for robustness.
GSEA is more sensitive but also more prone to false positives with noisy rankings. Need to verify kME ranking is stable (bootstrap or split-half).
ECM score construction is circular if ECM genes are derived from the same module being tested. Must use external gene lists (MSigDB, literature) not module-derived.
Signed network may require different power value. Soft threshold must be re-evaluated for signed network. Power=4 may not apply.
Brown module is smaller; core analysis may have too few genes for meaningful enrichment.

confounders.name: Core cutoff arbitrariness
confounders.text: Top-kME cutoff (100/200/500) affects results; must report sensitivity across cutoffs

confounders.name: ECM score circularity
confounders.text: If ECM genes come from the module itself, correlation is tautological

confounders.name: Signed power selection
confounders.text: Signed network power differs from unsigned; must re-run soft threshold analysis

diagnostic_tests.name: Cutoff sensitivity
diagnostic_tests.text: Run core ORA at top-100, top-200, top-500 kME; report which pathways survive across cutoffs

diagnostic_tests.name: External ECM list
diagnostic_tests.text: Use MSigDB HALLMARK_EMT or REACTOME_ECM_PATHWAY gene sets, not module-derived genes

diagnostic_tests.name: Signed power check
diagnostic_tests.text: Re-run pickSoftThreshold with networkType='signed'; report new power if different from 4

verdict: H1 and H2 are testable with current data. H3 is testable but requires external ECM gene list to avoid circularity. H4 is testable but may require new power value. H5 (null) must be reported. H6 is secondary.

attacks.text: 核心基因截断（前 200-500）是任意的。不同截断可能产生不同富集结果。必须测试多个截断（100, 200, 500）验证稳健性。
GSEA 更敏感但排名噪音时也更容易假阳性。需验证 kME 排名稳定性（bootstrap 或半分裂）。
ECM 评分构建是循环的，如果 ECM 基因来自被测试的同一模块。必须使用外部基因列表（MSigDB、文献）。
Signed network 可能需要不同 power 值。必须重新评估 soft threshold。
Brown 模块较小；核心分析可能基因数不足。

confounders.name: 截断任意性
confounders.text: Top-kME 截断（100/200/500）影响结果；必须报告跨截断敏感性

confounders.name: ECM 评分循环性
confounders.text: 如果 ECM 基因来自模块本身，相关性是同义反复

confounders.name: Signed power 选择
confounders.text: Signed network power 与 unsigned 不同；必须重新运行 soft threshold

diagnostic_tests.name: 截断敏感性
diagnostic_tests.text: 在 top-100、top-200、top-500 kME 下运行核心 ORA；报告哪些通路跨截断存活

diagnostic_tests.name: 外部 ECM 列表
diagnostic_tests.text: 使用 MSigDB HALLMARK_EMT 或 REACTOME_ECM_PATHWAY 基因集，不用模块衍生基因

diagnostic_tests.name: Signed power 检查
diagnostic_tests.text: 用 networkType='signed' 重新运行 pickSoftThreshold；报告新 power

cn.verdict: H1 和 H2 可用现有数据测试。H3 可测试但需外部 ECM 基因列表避免循环。H4 可测试但可能需新 power。H5（零假设）必须报告。H6 是次要的。
